title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
